# Warrantee - Trust the Terms
> Bilingual warranty management platform for the Middle East

## About
Warrantee is a SaaS platform that helps consumers and businesses manage product warranties digitally. Supporting both Arabic (RTL) and English, it provides warranty tracking, claims management, and seller integration.

## Features
- Digital warranty registration and tracking
- Warranty expiry notifications (30/15/7 days)
- Claims management workflow
- Seller dashboard and invitation system
- Bilingual support (Arabic RTL + English LTR)
- Email-to-warranty auto-booking
- ERP integration via REST API
- Warranty chain and transfer management

## URLs
- Main site: https://warrantee.sa
- English: https://warrantee.sa/en
- Arabic: https://warrantee.sa/ar
- API: https://warrantee.sa/api

## Contact
- Email: support@warrantee.sa
